title: Redesigned the site around how I actually work with clients
body: The site now reflects what Botworks Agency is really about: solving workflow problems for small businesses using AI. Added examples of work I've built, and made it easier to get in touch.

title: Built a Redfin estimate accuracy checker for active listings
body: If you're looking at a home on Redfin, this tool checks how accurate Redfin's estimate has been on nearby homes that already sold — so you know whether to trust the number before making an offer.

title: Separated Redfin tools by use case
body: The original Redfin estimate checker only worked on sold properties. Now there are two: one for homes currently listed for sale, and one for off-market properties. Each is tailored to its specific use case.

title: Built a Redfin estimate checker for off-market properties
body: Curious whether Redfin's estimate on a property is trustworthy? This tool checks Redfin's track record on nearby sold homes and gives you a neighborhood accuracy report.

title: botworksagency.com is live
body: Launched the site with the first tool: a real estate photo downloader that saves every photo from a listing page in one click. Works with Redfin, Zillow, and Compass.
